items.md: # THE BEST OF WALT DISNEY COMICS (Golden Press)
items.value: THE BEST OF WALT DISNEY COMICS (Golden Press)

items.md: There were four titles in this set (the fourth, No. 96171, was made up of Floyd Gottfredson "Mickey Mouse" comic-strip reprints). They were published in a semi-hardcover format, with much better printing, color and paper than in ordinary comic books. Barks's authorship of the reprinted stories was acknowledged in brief introductions to each book.
items.value: There were four titles in this set (the fourth, No. 96171, was made up of Floyd Gottfredson "Mickey Mouse" comic-strip reprints). They were published in a semi-hardcover format, with much better printing, color and paper than in ordinary comic books. Barks's authorship of the reprinted stories was acknowledged in brief introductions to each book.
